cost_name: Alkaline H₂ Purification — Deoxo + Dryer for Mobility Offtake — 100 MW — Europe 2025

estimation.estimation_method: IRENA 2024 + PSA/deoxo system cost data. Alkaline 99.9% purity requires catalytic deoxo purifier (removes trace O₂) + TSA dryer for fuel cell-grade H₂ (>99.97%). PEM does not need this for industrial offtake.

confidence.rationale: Deoxo and PSA systems are mature technology (industrial gas industry). Cost is well-established. The Alkaline purity penalty only applies to mobility offtake — industrial offtake (refinery, ammonia) does not require this.

primary_drivers: Required final purity (99.97% for fuel cell, 99.9% sufficient for industrial)
Deoxo catalyst bed sizing and regeneration
H₂ loss during regeneration (1-3% of throughput)
exclusions: Applicable only to mobility fraction of production

sources.title: IRENA 2024 — Purification cost for fuel cell grade H₂
sources.author: IRENA
